hero.title: Mil Sabores
hero.subtitle: Enjoy an artisanal brunch in the heart of Lisbon, just steps from Praça do Comércio, with sweet and savory options and specialty coffee.
hero.seo_h2: Mil Sabores - Artisanal Brunch and Italian Gelato in Baixa, Lisbon, Rua da Prata

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Mil Sabores is more than a restaurant: it's a unique dining experience where artisanal brunch meets authentic Italian gelato.
about.para1: Located on Rua da Prata, right in the heart of Baixa, we offer
about.para1_mid: with fresh ingredients, artisanal recipes and a
about.para2_mid: looking to enjoy breakfast in Lisbon, close to the city's main historic landmarks.
about.para3: From fluffy pancakes to gourmet toasts and specialty coffee, every detail is designed to make your break memorable.
about.feature1_desc: Every dish is prepared with fresh ingredients and plenty of care
about.feature2_desc: Carefully selected products and authentic artisanal gelato
about.feature3_desc: The perfect space to unwind from the pace of the city

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real reviews from Google Maps - 4.7★ from 1,200+ reviews

1.text: The banana and Nutella pancakes are amazing! The portions are generous and everything is made with fresh ingredients. The staff is super friendly and the service is lightning fast. Perfect location near Praça do Comércio.
1.author: Sarah Johnson

2.text: Spectacular breakfast with views of the São Nicolau church. The açaí bowl was delicious and the coffee was perfect. Excellent value for being right in the heart of Lisbon. We'll definitely be back!
2.author: Miguel Fernández

3.text: The avocado toast with poached egg was one of the best I've ever had. Attentive staff who speak several languages. The artisanal gelato for dessert was the perfect finishing touch. Highly recommended!
3.author: Laura Rossi

4.text: Fresh, fast and absolutely delicious food. The staff is warm and attentive to every detail. The scrambled eggs with salmon are fantastic. The presentation is beautiful — you can tell they really care about quality.
4.author: João Pereira

5.text: We stumbled upon this place by chance and it turned out to be the best surprise of our trip. The menu has so much variety, from vegan options to classics. Everything was delicious and reasonably priced. The outdoor terrace is lovely.
5.author: Emma Schmidt

punctuality.title: Punctuality
punctuality.text: So that your whole group can enjoy the experience to the fullest, we ask that all guests arrive at the scheduled time. Tables are held for 15 minutes after the reserved time.

seating.title: Table Preference
seating.text: We can't guarantee a specific table or location, but if you leave a comment with your reservation, we'll do our best to accommodate your preference.

items.1: Free cancellations up to 24 hours before your reservation
items.2: Please let us know if you can't make it
items.3: We recommend arriving 10 minutes before your reserved time
items.4: We hold your table for 15 minutes after the reserved time

1.q: Do I need to make a reservation?
1.a: We recommend booking ahead, especially on weekends. On weekdays, we generally have availability for walk-ins.

2.a: Yes! For groups of 8 or more, please contact us directly so we can arrange the best accommodations.

3.a: Yes, we have several vegetarian and vegan options on our menu. Just let us know about any dietary restrictions.

4.q: Can I change or cancel my reservation?
4.a: Yes, you can change or cancel free of charge up to 24 hours in advance. Contact us by phone or email.

success.title: Reservation Confirmed!
success.message: You'll receive a confirmation email shortly. We look forward to your visit!

fullMenu.title: Our Menu
fullMenu.subtitle: Brunch is so much more than a late breakfast: it's about taking a break, sharing, and enjoying without rushing.
fullMenu.intro: Our menu is designed for every taste and every occasion. We combine sweet and savory options, artisanal recipes and fresh ingredients so that every visit is a complete experience in the heart of Lisbon.

brunch.customization_note: Choose your eggs: fried, poached or scrambled · Bread: whole wheat or rustic Portuguese

mil_sabores.name: MIL SABORES
mil_sabores.desc: Crispy toast with olive oil and oregano, avocado, eggs your way, crispy bacon and sautéed mushrooms with tomato. Served with fresh fruit, orange juice or lemonade and espresso.

americano.name: AMERICAN CLASSIC
americano.desc: The authentic American breakfast: artisanal toast, 2 eggs your way, avocado, crispy bacon and two pancakes with honey. Served with fresh fruit, orange juice or lemonade and espresso.

lisboa.name: BRUNCH LISBOA
lisboa.desc: Two eggs your way with Mediterranean toasted bread, mixed greens with citrus vinaigrette, crispy bacon and the iconic pastel de nata. Served with fruit or yogurt with granola, juice and espresso.

vegano.name: VEGAN GOURMET
vegano.desc: 100% vegan: artisanal toast with sautéed portobello mushrooms and tomatoes, avocado, scrambled tofu, balsamic reduction and mixed greens. Served with fresh fruit, juice and espresso.

salmon.name: SMOKED SALMON
salmon.desc: Two eggs your way with aromatic toasted bread, smoked salmon, mixed greens with citrus vinaigrette and pastel de nata. Served with fruit or yogurt with granola, juice and espresso.

halloumi.name: MEDITERRANEAN HALLOUMI
halloumi.desc: Artisanal toasted bread with egg your way, avocado, tricolor quinoa and golden grilled halloumi cheese. Served with fresh fruit, juice and espresso.

para_dos.name: FOR TWO
para_dos.desc: A complete experience to share: 2 mini avocado toasts, 2 mini banana toasts with peanut butter, scrambled eggs, mushrooms and spinach, 2 mini pancakes, 2 fruit salads and 2 yogurts with granola. Includes 2 juices and 2 coffees.

dulces.note: Available as Pancakes, Crepe or Waffle · All come with your choice of artisanal gelato
